command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
JOB="job-20260625T123626Z-725c302a"
STATE="/home/jose/.local/state/moreno-unified-delegator"

echo "=== JOB STATUS ==="
cat $STATE/jobs/$JOB/job.json | python3 -c "
import json,sys
j=json.load(sys.stdin)
print("status:",j.get("status"),"stage:",j.get("stage"))
wu=j.get("worker_usage",{})
print("workers: 3060=",wu.get("windows-ollama-3060",0),"3090=",wu.get("windows-ollama-3090",0))
for ev in j.get("events",[]):
    print(" ",ev.get("at","")[-9:],ev.get("stage",""),"-",ev.get("message","")[:80])
"

echo "=== LOG SIZE ==="
wc -c $STATE/logs/$JOB.runner.log 2>/dev/null

echo "=== ALL JOBS ==="
ls $STATE/jobs/

echo "=== OLLAMA 3090 ==="
curl -s http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/ps | python3 -c "
import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
for m in d.get("models",[]): print("running:",m["name"])
if not d.get("models"): print("idle")
"

echo "=== SYSLOG OOM CHECK ==="
journalctl --since "2026-06-25 12:00:00" -n 20 --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -i "oom\|kill\|python\|moreno\|memory" | head -10 || echo "no hits"
' 2>&1
echo DONE_1953
